chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding Looking at Women

text: 4973 - وَ رَوَى هِشَامٌ وَ حَفْصٌ وَ حَمَّادُ بْنُ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: "مَا يَأْمَنُ اَلَّذِينَ يَنْظُرُونَ فِي أَدْبَارِ اَلنِّسَاءِ أَنْ يُبْتَلَوْا بِذَلِكَ فِي نِسَائِهِمْ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4973 - Hisham, Hafs, and Hammad ibn Uthman narrated from Abu Abdullah (Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as)) that Imam (as) said:
"Those who look at women from behind, are they not afraid that the same may happen to their own women?"
